spec_match.rationale: Exceptional workspace mapping the entire Flexbox layout engine controls (justify-content, gap, wrap direction, width) to visually inspect row balancer distributions.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding controls. Features a full dynamic dashboard with range sliders, select menus, and an output terminal that automatically writes and copies the CSS snippet.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Highly valuable tool demonstrating variable widths, narrow pills, and balanced row lengths.

edge_cases.rationale: Perfectly maps diverse browser widths (150px to 700px) and item counts (2 to 20 items).

references.rationale: The page now includes the mandatory chromestatus.com/feature/4547107962486784 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Clean dark monospace console container alongside stone-colored outline control frames.

summary: The authoring-studio is a top-tier layout customizer for developers to test flex properties and now includes the required ChromeStatus reference.
